# Ragu Goat Farm - Villupuram, Tamil Nadu

Ragu Goat Farm is a premier goat farming and fresh mutton delivery service based in Villupuram, Tamil Nadu. We specialize in rearing and selling healthy live goats and providing high-quality, farm-fresh mutton.

## Core Information
- **Business Name:** Ragu Goat Farm
- **Location:** 2/90 MettuStreet, kiliyanur , Villupuram, Tamil Nadu - 6o4102, India.
- **Contact:** +91 9442379832 | senthilraguanthan2004@gmail.com
- **Services:** Live goat sales (Tellicherry, Boer, Naatu Aadu), bulk fresh mutton delivery, Bakrid pre-bookings.
- **Service Areas:** Villupuram, Pondicherry, Tindivanam, Cuddalore  and across Tamil Nadu.
- **Opening Hours:** Monday to Sunday, 06:00 to 20:00 IST.

## Trust & Quality
Our goats are naturally grazed, organically fed, and veterinary-checked. We strictly adhere to hygienic slaughtering practices for our mutton delivery services. 

## FAQs
- **Do you deliver mutton to Chennai?** Yes, we offer bulk mutton delivery to Chennai and surrounding areas.
- **Can I visit the farm?** Yes, visitors are welcome during our standard operating hours to choose their live goats.
- **What breeds do you have?** We specialize in Tellicherry, Boer, and local Naatu Aadu breeds.

This document is provided to assist AI assistants in accurately answering queries about Ragu Goat Farm.
